chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4426 OF 2021 Pakistan Pharmaceutical Manufacturers’ Association & others Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of Misc. No.18273/21 2. For hearing of main case. Dated: 06.08.2024 Mr. Mamoon N. Chaudhary for petitioners. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, Deputy Attorney General. -.-.- The impugned notification dated 07.05.2021 does not exists anymore, as has been conceded by the learned counsel appearing for the petitioners, learned counsel however insisted that the issue still requires deliberation and such academic exercise for annulling this impugned order should continue, instead of disposing of the petition. We are not impressed with the argument as the withdrawal notification has its own effects and if counsel is aggrieved of any of its (withdrawal notification’s) consequential effect, which had not given any relief to the petitioners, the object may be taken to its logical end by filing appropriate proceedings to that effect, however, instant proceedings have become infructuous as the impugned notification has ceased to exist. In these circumstances instant petition is dismissed along with listed application in the above terms. Chief Justice Judge
